svg.title: DFD Level 1 — SDL Threat Management App
svg.desc: Data Flow Diagram showing external entities, processes, data stores, and trust boundaries for the Python CLI SDL application with PostgreSQL backend running in Docker.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What threats target the User/Operator entity in STRIDE?')
sendPrompt('What threats target the Pinger container in STRIDE?')
sendPrompt('What threats affect log file confidentiality?')
sendPrompt('What STRIDE threats apply to the CLI App process?')
sendPrompt('What STRIDE threats apply to the Query Engine?')
sendPrompt('What STRIDE threats apply to credential handling?')
sendPrompt('What STRIDE threats apply to the PostgreSQL database?')
sendPrompt('What STRIDE threats apply to the table/column whitelist?')
